products.name: DGYF200 Portable Induction Sealer
products.description:
The DGYF200 Portable Induction Sealer is a compact, efficient, and easy-to-use induction sealing machine designed for sealing non-metallic containers with foil-lined caps. It creates an airtight and tamper-evident seal by using electromagnetic induction to bond the foil liner to the container’s mouth.

Ideal for small to medium packaging operations, the DGYF200 Induction Sealer is widely used in industries like food & beverage, pharmaceuticals, cosmetics, agrochemicals, lubricants, and more. Its portable design makes it perfect for on-demand sealing needs without requiring bulky equipment or production line integration.

Key Features:
Portable handheld design — easy to operate and move

Creates airtight and tamper-evident seals

Adjustable sealing time for various cap sizes and foil types

No warm-up required; instant induction sealing

Suitable for plastic and glass containers with foil-lined caps

Used in food, pharma, cosmetics, chemical industries

Whether you are sealing bottles of juice, medicines, creams, or chemicals, the DGYF200 Portable Induction Sealer ensures secure, professional-grade packaging that enhances product safety and shelf life.

products.name: PFS200 Hand Sealer
products.description:
The PFS200 Hand Sealer is a lightweight, manual impulse heat sealing machine designed for quick and efficient sealing of plastic bags and pouches. This compact and versatile sealer is ideal for small businesses, shops, home-based packaging, and low-volume industrial packaging needs.

Operating on impulse heat, the PFS200 creates an airtight and tamper-proof seal on various materials including polyethylene (PE), polypropylene (PP), bubble wraps, laminated films, and other thermoplastic materials. No warm-up time is required — simply press the handle, and the sealer delivers a strong, clean seal in seconds.

Key Features:
Sealing width: 200 mm (8 inches)

Adjustable sealing time for different bag thicknesses

No warm-up required; instant operation

Energy-efficient — consumes power only when sealing

Lightweight, portable, and easy to operate

Suitable for retail packaging, food sealing, pharmaceuticals, spare parts, documents, and more

Whether you're sealing snack packs, electronics, or promotional items, the PFS200 Hand Sealer ensures a professional finish and enhanced product protection with every use.

products.name: DBF900L Band Sealer MSH
products.description:
The DBF900L Band Sealer is a powerful and versatile vertical continuous band sealer designed to handle a wide range of bag and pouch sealing applications. Ideal for packaging products in standing pouches or bags containing liquids, powders, or granular items, this machine ensures a strong and consistent seal every time.

Equipped with adjustable sealing height, precise temperature and speed controls, and a durable stainless-steel build, the DBF900L is perfect for industrial, commercial, and small business packaging lines. Its vertical sealing orientation makes it ideal for sealing heavier or bulkier packages that cannot be sealed horizontally.

Key features:

Vertical sealing for liquid, powder, and bulk packaging

Adjustable conveyor and sealing height

Continuous operation for higher productivity

Suitable for food, pharmaceuticals, chemicals, agriculture, and more

The DBF900L Band Sealer helps businesses streamline their packaging operations with speed, reliability, and professional sealing quality. Upgrade your packaging line with the DBF900L — an ideal solution for vertical bag sealing needs.
